HOME.TITLE: Design your onboard electrical setup

RESULTS.TITLE: Your recommended setup
RESULTS.SUBTITLE: A clear estimate to start your onboard installation.
RESULTS.INFO: Reliable first estimate for a mobile electrical setup. More precise tuning can be added later based on battery type, climate and real solar production.
RESULTS.EMPTY_TEXT: Start by creating a configuration to view recommendations.
RESULTS.RECOMMENDED_PRODUCTS: Vechline products adapted to your setup
RESULTS.NO_PRODUCTS: No Vechline product compatible with your configuration
